title.en: The Ancestor of All Things is dead!

content.en:
The Ancestor of All Things is dead!

The other Ancestors were far from expecting this, and when the Ancestor of All Things took out the Enchantment Ancestral Crystal and the Innate Ancestor Weapon, they thought that Ye Tian, the Ancestor who had just been promoted, would fall.

However, they were wrong, and it was the progenitor of all things who fell.

How long has it been since a single statue has fallen?

There were far more than one or two ancestors in the Dark Forbidden Realm, even more than double digits, but it had been a long time since the last Fallen Ancestor, so this time there was an Ancestor, which shocked them.

In particular, several new Ancestors realized that Ancestors would also fall.

For a while, everyone was afraid of Ye Tian.

The top elite ancestor combat power of the main body, can definitely be promoted to the top ancestor in the near future, and the clone has the top ancestor combat power in the dark soul domain.

How terrible is such an ancestor, even more terrible than the destruction of the Ancestor and the Holy Ancestor!

Rushing!!!

The Battle Ancestor and the Realm Ancestor appeared beside Ye Tian one after another, and all of a sudden, the Battle Gate was equivalent to having four Ancestors, and with the top Ancestor combat power, they surpassed the Dark Holy Gate at once, and they could be called the First Holy Gate of the Dark Holy Domain.

Of course.

The battle gate does not yet have the top ancestor combat power in the outside world, after all, the combat power of the doppelganger Aoba ancestor in the outside world is not as good as the main body, so it needs to be low-key for the time being.

If Ye Tian's body broke through to the top ancestor combat power, and then copied one body, it would be equivalent to two top ancestors, plus a clone that could exert the top ancestor combat power in the Dark Soul Domain, which was equivalent to the combat power of three top ancestors.

At that time, the battle gate had greater confidence, and the human race had greater confidence.

Right now, Ye Tian couldn't directly contend with so many ancestors, otherwise so many ancestors joined forces, they would not be opponents.

Therefore, these ancestors were looking for resources in the Primordial Ancestral Realm, and Ye Tian did not stop them.

One by one, the other Ancestors left, looking for resources.

Ye Tian didn't waste any time and looked for resources at an extremely fast speed.

The Aoba Ancestor also mobilized the power of the Dark Soul Domain to search for the resources of the Primordial Ancestral Realm.

Perhaps because of the fall of an ancestor, the ancestors did not continue to fight, unless they encountered more precious resources, and they only fought occasionally, but it ended quickly.

In the next hundreds of millions of years, the Dark Soul Domain was in a stage of resource explosion, and a large number of domain ancestors poured into the Dark Soul Domain to grab resources and fight.

And the ancestors didn't do anything, this is the rule of the ancestors, and it is not allowed to meddle in the affairs of the ancestors without a superior domain.

Although the Terrans are now powerful, they are unable to resist all the forces in the entire Dark Forbidden Domain, so they can only give up most of their territory and concentrate on the resource-rich areas.

Gradually, the division of the territory of the Dark Soul Domain became clear.

Almost every faction occupies a huge territory, and even the powerhouses of the Dark Destruction Domain occupy more than enough territory.

As for the local forces of the Dark Soul Domain, they are more miserable, so there is no ancestor, and their status is too low, and many forces have been destroyed or swallowed up by other forces.

As the years passed, these native forces ceased to exist, and gradually merged into the forces of the Dark Soul Domain and the Dark Destruction Domain.

In fact, the Dark Soul Domain was already controlled by the Terrans, and there were not many local forces, and now after such a move, the local forces were naturally destroyed.

It can be said that the Dark Soul Domain has completely become the territory of the Dark Soul Domain, the Dark Destruction and the Eternal Sect.

They don't have the luck of the Dark Sanctuary and can control their own Dark Sanctuary.

The years passed slowly, and 300 million years passed in the blink of an eye.

At this time, the resource explosion stage of the Dark Soul Domain is over, and more resources may be born later, but it is almost impossible to be born with such a concentration of resources as now.

Other than that.

The Primordial Ancestral Realm was also blocked, after all, the previous battle had injured the Primordial Ancestral Realm, and the Primordial Ancestral Realm of a Dark Sanctuary must be well preserved so that it could get more good resources in the future.

If it is not blocked, it will cause too much damage to the Primordial Ancestral Realm, and it will affect the operation of the Primordial Ancestral Realm in the future, and it will be difficult to give birth to precious treasures.

More importantly, no force can completely occupy the Primordial Ancestral Realm, and this is the real reason.

At this time, a second Ancestral Realm was born in addition to the Primordial Ancestral Realm.

According to the birth rules of the Dark Holy Land, every other realm year, the Dark Soul Domain will give birth to an Ancestral Realm, and a total of ten Ancestral Realms can be born, of course, these ten Ancestral Realms do not include the Primordial Ancestral Realm.

For the sake of the ancestral realm, the ancestors began to discuss.

The meeting began.

Ye Tian demanded: "Our human race occupies an ancestral realm!"

"Why?"

The Ancestor of Destruction said angrily.

The other Patriarchs also disagreed.

"With my clone, I am in charge of part of the authority of the Dark Soul Domain, and I can exert the combat power of the top ancestor, and I am about to be promoted to the top ancestor!"

Ye Tian's body showed a breath, which was even more powerful than the breath of 300 million years ago.

In the past 300 million years, Ye Tian has also been secretly refining the Silent Annihilation Treasures, although the cultivation time is not long, he can't stand the fact that he has used time to accelerate the cultivation of the Great Array again and again, so he has refined a large number of Silent Annihilation Treasures, and his strength is about to enter the top Ancestor combat power.

"At most, in 100 million years, the Ten Thousand Law Ancestors will inevitably be promoted to the top Ancestors!"

The Ancestor of Destruction and the Holy Ancestor were all jealous.

But they couldn't kill Ye Tian, because Ye Tian was extremely close to the top ancestor combat power, and he had a defensive ultimate ancestor skill, such an ancestor was too difficult to kill.

In addition, Ye Tian also has a clone of the top ancestor combat power, which cannot be killed.

"Agreed!"

"Agreed!"

The Ancestor of Destruction consulted with the Holy Ancestor and decided to give the Terran an ancestral realm.

But the next place in the ancestral realm, the human race is not allowed to compete anymore.

However, there are still nine Ancestral Realms left, and so many forces are definitely not enough, and when the time comes, there will inevitably be several forces in charge of an Ancestral Realm at the same time, and use the Ancestral Realm as a public world.

Next, Ye Tian refined this ancestral realm and renamed it Huaxia Ancestral Realm.

The human race originated in China, so using this name can be regarded as nostalgia for China on the earth.

Subsequently, a large number of strong people of the human race entered the Huaxia ancestral realm, and countless human races moved here.

An ancestral realm is incomparably huge, and it can accommodate many, many people.

In addition, with the Huaxia ancestral realm as the core, the Terran branch is here.

Basically, almost all the Terrans in other parts of the Dark Soul Domain have moved here, so as not to be wiped out by other forces.

Before the Xuanxu Saint Realm was not promoted to the Ancestral Realm, the Huaxia Ancestral Realm would become the core world of the human race for a period of time in the future.
